codex_binary.hint: Leave as codex when the AstrBot process can find Codex CLI from PATH.

workdir.hint: Leave empty to use the AstrBot process directory. Prefer a project or sandbox directory.

timeout_seconds.description: Maximum seconds to wait for one Codex request.

max_output_chars.description: Maximum characters in one chat reply.

require_admin.description: Restrict Codex calls in group chats to admins and allow-listed users.

allow_users.description: Comma-separated sender IDs that can always call Codex.
allow_users.hint: Keep real IDs in local AstrBot configuration only. Do not commit them.

model.hint: Leave empty to use the Codex CLI default model.

soul_file.hint: Relative paths are resolved from the plugin directory. Bundled examples include SOUL-Amiya.md and SOUL-Eyjafjalla.md.

strip_thinking.description: Remove common thinking tags from model output.

command_prefixes.description: Comma-separated plain-text prefixes that trigger the plugin. Mentioning the bot also triggers it.
command_prefixes.hint: Native AstrBot slash commands are not intercepted. Example for Eyjafjalla: 艾雅法拉,Eyjafjalla,小羊.

unmatched_policy.description: How to handle non-slash plain text messages that do not match command_prefixes or mention the bot.
unmatched_policy.hint: Slash commands are always passed to AstrBot. Use silent if AstrBot has no provider and you only want prefixed Codex chat.

log_events.hint: Logs do not include message text, account IDs, tokens, or local paths.

session_enabled.description: Use Codex native sessions and resume by thread id.

session_ttl_minutes.description: Drop inactive native sessions after this many minutes.

session_max_turns.description: Reset a chat session after this many Codex turns.

session_max_sessions.description: Maximum active chat sessions retained by the plugin.

session_persist_state.description: Persist hashed chat keys and Codex thread ids across AstrBot restarts.

session_cleanup_native_files.description: Try to delete matching Codex native session files when plugin sessions expire or reset.

session_state_file.hint: Leave empty to store state under AstrBot data/plugin_data for this plugin.
